# InsightPulseAI

> AI-native operations for marketing, media, retail, and financial services.

## What We Do

InsightPulseAI combines Odoo on Cloud, Pulser (operational intelligence), analytics, and managed cloud operations into one scalable operating model for growing businesses.

## Product Stack

- Odoo on Cloud: Modular ERP platform hosted on Azure. Finance, CRM, sales, inventory, projects, HR, and operations.
- Pulser: AI-native intelligence layer for Odoo workflows. Surfaces context, detects exceptions, accelerates action. Not a chatbot — an operational intelligence system.
- Cloud Operations: Managed delivery, security, backups, governance, and performance optimization for Odoo environments.
- Analytics & Dashboards: Real-time KPI visibility, drill-down reporting, AI-assisted insights, and cross-functional views powered by Databricks and Power BI.

## Technology

- Runtime: Azure Container Apps
- ERP: Odoo CE 19
- AI: Microsoft Azure AI Foundry (Pulser agent runtime)
- OCR: Azure AI Document Intelligence
- Analytics: Databricks + Power BI
- Identity: Microsoft Entra ID
- Edge: Azure (direct to ACA)

## Industries

- Marketing operations
- Media & entertainment
- Retail operations
- Financial services

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://www.insightpulseai.com
- ERP login: https://erp.insightpulseai.com
- Contact: https://www.insightpulseai.com/#contact
- Book demo: https://insightpulseai.zohobookings.com/

## Company

- Name: InsightPulseAI
- Domain: insightpulseai.com
- AI assistant brand: Pulser
- Location: Philippines / remote

## Naming

- Corporate brand: InsightPulseAI (one word, no space)
- AI product: Pulser (not Copilot, not IPAI Copilot, not Odoo Copilot)
- ERP offer: Odoo on Cloud
- Managed services: Cloud Operations
- BI offer: Analytics & Dashboards
